nodes.id: Exhibit D — Duty Of Care & Travel Risk Management Services

properties.role: Employer with duty of care obligations
properties.primary_responsibility: Retains primary responsibility for duty of care obligations

properties.description: Services provided by Direct Travel to support Client's travel risk management program

properties.role: Provider of travel risk management services

properties.purpose: Classifications with corresponding service level objectives

properties.act: Occupational Safety and Health Act of 1970
properties.requirement: Employers must furnish workplace free from recognized hazards causing death or serious physical harm

nodes.id: Health And Safety At Work Act 1974

properties.requirement: Employers must ensure employees' health, safety, and welfare so far as reasonably practicable

nodes.id: Management Of Health And Safety At Work Regulations 1999

properties.requirement: Requiring risk assessments and relevant employee information and training

nodes.id: Corporate Manslaughter And Corporate Homicide Act 2007

properties.requirement: Employers must ensure safety and health of workers in every aspect related to work, including risk assessment and preventive measures

properties.title: Travel Risk Management
properties.description: First international standard for travel risk management, derived from ISO 31000
properties.framework_coverage: Policy development, threat identification, risk assessment, prevention and mitigation strategies, traveler tracking, two-way communication, crisis management planning, and programme evaluation

properties.scope: Health and safety, employment, and common-law duty of care frameworks

properties.standard: Commercially reasonable efforts consistent with generally accepted practices
properties.benchmark: Organizations of similar size, scope, and risk profile

properties.notification_required: material changes to platform or capabilities

properties.description: Minor disruption with limited direct impact on Travelers; informational alert only
properties.examples: Localized weather warning, minor transportation delay, low-level protest in non-traveler area

properties.description: Moderate disruption that may impact Travelers; targeted alerts issued; optional welfare check
properties.examples: Significant weather event approaching, regional transportation strike announced, elevated security alert in destination city

properties.description: Significant disruption likely impacting one or more Travelers; proactive outreach required
properties.examples: Major weather event (hurricane, earthquake) in Traveler area, civil unrest near Traveler locations, airport closure, disease outbreak with local transmission

properties.description: Immediate life safety risk or large-scale disruption affecting multiple Travelers; urgent outreach and crisis escalation
properties.examples: Terrorist attack, active armed conflict, catastrophic natural disaster, pandemic border closures, mass-casualty transportation incident

properties.client_escalation: Notification to primary program contact within 4 hours
Notification to escalation roster within 60 minutes
Contact Client escalation roster within 30 minutes; Crisis Bridge within 60 minutes
properties.status_update: Target: every 30 minutes during acute phase; hourly during sustained phase

properties.causes: Telecommunications infrastructure outages, Government-imposed communication restrictions, Supplier system outages, Incomplete Traveler profile data, Off-Channel Bookings, Simultaneous multi-region incidents, Force majeure events

properties.priority_order: SMS, email, mobile application push notification, voice call

properties.meaning: Traveler is not in immediate danger and does not require assistance
properties.action: Log status; no further action unless conditions change

properties.meaning: Traveler requires support (rebooking, information, medical/security referral)
properties.action: Attempt live contact; provide assistance per Section 3.5

properties.meaning: Traveler is not in or near the affected area
properties.action: Log status; remove from active outreach for this Incident

properties.meaning: Traveler has not responded within the configured outreach window

properties.purpose: First point of contact for all Incidents
Contact for Incidents occurring outside Client Business Hours
Contact for Incidents involving employee welfare, injury, or fatality

properties.content: current assessment of event status and trajectory; count and status of identified Travelers; actions taken and pending; supplier constraints or disruptions; recommended next steps

properties.description: corporate travel bookings made outside managed travel programs
material gap in Client's duty of care coverage
ingestion of forwarded itinerary confirmation emails via automated email parsing

properties.limitation: not suitable for real-time duty of care

nodes.id: Uk Package Travel And Linked Travel Arrangements Regulations 2018

properties.includes: incident counts, SLO performance, traveler welfare checks, booking visibility analysis, improvement recommendations

properties.purpose: identify improvements, assess response effectiveness, update protocols

properties.notification_required: material changes to structure or coverage model
applicable changes impacting Duty of Care Services

properties.triggers: changes in travel program, risk environment, regulatory requirements, industry best practices

Section 10 Limitations Disclaimers And Allocation Of Risk

properties.description: Contact local emergency services first if in immediate danger
